MarcHacks
TODO
tiddlers.text:
# Roadmap

## General

- Loading http://localhost:3002/packages/demo.json breaks broadsheet theme because of OnboardingMacro
- Move automatic [[wikilinks]] into a base plugin
- Move automatic WikiLinks into a demo plugin
- Link to tiddlers via (possibly not installed) package name [[demo:WikiLinksPlugin]]
  - System fetches the package if it does not exist

## Failover

Goal: make twikki recover gracefully from errors

- On boot, after loading packages we save. If this fails, don't implode, warn and continue
  - Suggest cleaning up localStorage by listing the largest keys (probably workspaces)
  - Create a base plugin similar to MassDelete but prettier which shows heavy localStorage keys and allows deletion

## Performance

Can/should we offload large scripts (like markdown-it) to HTTP (like hljs) - we're not truly offline anyway.
Or find a simpler/smaller implementation?

## Search

- Create a `<<pill>>` widget to list tiddlers matching a search:
  - `<<pill "Search Meta" Meta>>`: <<pill "Search Meta" Meta>>
  - `<<pill "Demo Package" $pck:demo>>`
  - `<<pill "My Favorites" tag:Favorite>>`

When rendering multi-part tiddlers, the `tags: $StyleSheet` section should display as pills with the `<<Tag>>` macro
Picker menus are very ugly
We need a Tag picker widget for editing tiddlers

## Links

- AllTagsLinked should use tag pills
- Plugin to auto link CamelCase tiddlers if they exist
- Browser history (back)

## Explorer Views

- Favorites view of favorite tiddlers
- History view of recently viewed tiddlers
- Recent view of recently edited tiddlers

## Toolbars

- favorites.toggle macro should Add to Favorites and toggle visibility of icon ⭐

# Source TODOs

Inline `// TODO` comments from across the codebase, grouped by file. The comments stay in source for code-reader context; this section is the index.

## Platform — `src/platform/`

- `twikki.platform.js:100` — Load registered scripts/css here like our highlighter core, css and languages
- `twikki.platform.js:266` — `isRawShadow = true` — what does this mean exactly?
- `twikki.platform.js:416` — Clear `events.clearAll()`
- `twikki.platform.js:464` — `<<packages.import url:... force:true save:true>>`
- `twikki.platform.js:473` — Split URL and check `update`/`force`/`save` options
- `twikki.compat-dialog.js:157` — Possible bug: does it read the URL the user entered?

## Core modules — `src/modules/`

- `core.js:38` — Should have subscribe to listen and override to handle
- `core.workspaces.js:81` — Save if dirty prompt
- `core.params.js:74` — Support unquoted eval with spaces: `{1 + 'a'}`
- `core.params.js:75` — Support quotes inside eval: `{fcn('a')}`
- `core.params.js:76` — Support quoted booleans/numbers `'"true" "1"'` → `["true", "1"]`
- `core.notifications.js:63` — Keep array of `tw.tmp.notifyMsgs = [{msg, expires}]`
- `core.search.js:77` — Apply `tw.templates.TiddlerSearchResult`
- `core.store.js:91` — Better local backups/versioning
- `core.packaging.js:28` — Replace `notify` with `throw new Error()`
- `core.packaging.js:63` — Not good as it generates events during boot
- `core.tiddlers.js:202` — Case-sensitive and allows duplicates like `AAA` + `aaa`
- `core.tiddlers.js:236` — If it's a code tiddler run it (if `!Disabled`) and show error in red
- `core.tiddlers.js:479` — Rename `$CodeDisabled` → `$Disabled` — the tag now gates more than code
- `core.ui.js:352` — **BUG**: Doesn't display tiddler after creation
- `core.ui.js:421` — Try / catch / return error `<span class="error">`
- `core.ui.js:475` — Return an element here we could bind a real event and payload to
- `core.render.js:77` — Label this tiddler to update when one of these macros change
- `core.render.js:117` — Inclusions (pass `{{DataTiddler}}` as string/array/object) would be cool
- `core.render.js:140` — Support async macros
- `core.render.js:161` — Support raw/wikified `{{=}}` inclusions
- `core.render.js:192` — Auto-link CamelCase words? except `~CamelCasedTilde`?
- `core.render.js:215` — If `$TiddlerDisplay` breaks TW is unusable!

## Base plugins — `src/packages/base/`

- `$GistSynchPlugin.js:35` — Pull force, clearing local
- `$GistSynchPlugin.js:36` — Selective Synch: Include/Exclude Tags/Packages
- `$GistSynchPlugin.js:105` — **BUG**: Deleted local shadow tiddler is pulled in from remote
- `$GistSynchPlugin.js:356` — Delete all local and pull (restore)

## Demo / marc / tests

- `demo/$FavoritesPlugin.js:38` — How to find the current tiddler/element?
- `demo/$FavoritesPlugin.js:65` — How to add `button:yellow svg {fill: yellow;}` to theme?
- `marc/CloseOthersPlugin.js:59` — Should be pub/sub: `event: 'tiddlers.closeAllButActive'`
- `tests/$TestFrameworkPlugin.js:82` — `expect.all(id => target.find...)`
- `tests/$TestFrameworkPlugin.js:100` — Save `currentTiddler` and `visibleTiddlers`
